scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: docker-compose exec backend npm run build && docker-compose exec backend node -e "require('pg').Pool({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL}).query(require('fs').readFileSync('./migrations/001_init.sql', 'utf8')).then(() => console.log('Migrated!')).catch(console.error)"
scripts.db:reset: npm run docker:down && docker volume rm shared-todo-app_postgres_data && npm run docker:up:build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: npm --prefix backend run test 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tests configured'
scripts.test:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run test 2>/dev/null || echo 'No tests configured'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:backend: npm --prefix backend run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No linter configured'
scripts.lint:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run lint 2>/dev/null || echo 'No linter configured'
scripts.clean: rm -rf backend/dist frontend/dist backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules node_modules
scripts.reset: npm run clean && npm run clean:docker && npm run install:all
scripts.docs: echo '📚 Project Documentation:' && echo '  - CLAUDE.md: Architecture & design docs' && echo '  - README.md: Setup & features' && echo '  - BUILD_SUMMARY.md: What was built'
scripts.status: echo '📊 Project Status:' && echo '  Backend: src/ → dist/ (Express + TypeScript)' && echo '  Frontend: src/ → dist/ (React + Vite)' && echo '  Database: PostgreSQL (migrations/ folder)' && echo '  Docker: docker-compose.yml configured'
scripts.help: echo '🔧 Available Commands:' && echo '' && echo '📦 Installation:' && echo '  npm run install:all     - Install all dependencies' && echo '' && echo '⚙️  Development:' && echo '  npm run dev             - Run backend & frontend together' && echo '  npm run dev:backend     - Run backend only (port 3001)' && echo '  npm run dev:frontend    - Run frontend only (port 5173)' && echo '' && echo '🔨 Build & Production:' && echo '  npm run build           - Build both backend & frontend' && echo '  npm run build:backend   - Build backend only' && echo '  npm run build:frontend  - Build frontend only' && echo '  npm run start           - Start production servers' && echo '' && echo '🐳 Docker:' && echo '  npm run docker:up       - Start services (compose up)' && echo '  npm run docker:down     - Stop services (compose down)' && echo '  npm run docker:up:build - Rebuild & start' && echo '  npm run docker:logs     - View all logs' && echo '  npm run db:reset        - Reset database' && echo '' && echo '✅ Quality:' && echo '  npm run typecheck       - TypeScript check (all)' && echo '  npm run test            - Run tests (if configured)' && echo '  npm run lint            - Run linters (if configured)' && echo '' && echo '🧹 Cleanup:' && echo '  npm run clean           - Remove dist, node_modules' && echo '  npm run clean:docker    - Stop & remove Docker volumes' && echo '  npm run reset           - Full clean slate' && echo '' && echo '📖 Info:' && echo '  npm run docs            - Show documentation files' && echo '  npm run status          - Show project structure' && echo '  npm run help            - Show this help message'

scripts-info.install:all: Installs dependencies for root, backend, and frontend
scripts-info.dev: Runs backend (3001) and frontend (5173) in parallel
scripts-info.dev:backend: Backend development server (Express, hot-reload with tsx watch)
scripts-info.build: Builds both backend (TypeScript → JavaScript) and frontend (Vite bundle)
scripts-info.docker:up: Starts PostgreSQL, backend, frontend via docker-compose
scripts-info.reset: Full clean slate: removes everything, reinstalls
scripts-info.help: Shows all available commands with descriptions
